title: Subnautica After Zero
description: This mod is a continuation of the Subnautica Franchise in minecraft with an all new story set after below zero!
body:
![title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b20db112bdc0cb9d8c59df40c56ec91392f9ce64.png)

_[Please Read Before Installing]:_

# Note for the release of subnautica 2

_Ive reacently played subnautica 2 its sorta inspiring me to come back to the project i haven't been touching this project as of recently due to the time it sorta went sloppy and just became and overaly mess... as ive been working on it all by myself im looking for anyone who works inside of **mcreator**, **block bench**, **Axiom world building** or voice acting if your skilled in anyone of these skillsets considering joining the discord and hitting me a DM ill prob be resurecting the project in the coming month so expect some news in the next 1-2 mounths_

### PLEASE JOIN THE DISCORD IF YOU HAVE ONE OF THESE SKILL SETS TO JOIN THE FUTURE DEV TEAM
### - Experince in World building (world edit or axiom)
- Mcreator
- Voice acting
- Block Bench
- Texturing
- Lore building/writing (Scripts Lore wise yk that kinda stuff)

## Before you play!

[Subnautica After Zero](https://modrinth.com/mod/subnautica-after-zero) is a story mod set a couple years after the events of [Subnautica Below Zero](https://www.google.com/search?q=subnautica+below+zero&ie=UTF-8) and is not intended to be played on its own, it is heavily recommened you download the map to play the full content of the story

This mod is still a work in progress, you may experiance bugs and issues along the way make sure to report them in our discord

## What does this mod add?

[Subnautica After Zero](https://modrinth.com/mod/subnautica-after-zero) adds plenty of features for the orignal two subnautica game though not identical they are quite heavily similiar from things such as fish, tools, biomes and ect. - take a look in Gallery to get a better look at what you'll be installing

## Where can I download the map?

The map can be downloaded on planet minecraft [Download Here](https://www.planetminecraft.com/project/subnautica-after-zero-modded-map/) and is recommend you install the modpack [Download Here](https://drive.google.com/file/d/1NdCi0u94gZKf7mE_fz70sLiW4YV9JyUE/view?usp=sharing) instead as it compiles the mod, reasourcepacks and the map all together 

**[TAKE NOTE THAT THE MAP IS MEANT TO ONLY BE PLAYED WITH 2-4 PLAYERS NO MORE NO LESS]**
 
## Can I add this to my own modpack?

Unforentaly no, well I mean you can but the mod was specificly made in mind to work with a set map [Download Here](https://www.planetminecraft.com/project/subnautica-after-zero-modded-map/), you can install it onto your own worlds but some things might not work correctly


- Offical Modpack [[Download Here]](https://drive.google.com/file/d/1NdCi0u94gZKf7mE_fz70sLiW4YV9JyUE/view?usp=sharing)
- Recommended Shader [[Download Here]](https://github.com/Merlin1809/Eclipse-Shader?tab=readme-ov-file)
